purpose: This repository contains end-to-end testing framework for Cross River Bank's lending and selling platform, simulating the entire environment including loan origination, servicing, purchasing, and accounting operations to validate the platform's functionality through comprehensive test scenarios.

apis.purpose: Gets account configurations for loan type changes

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Core loan data with loan status, amounts, and investor information

dataEntities.name: Contract
dataEntities.description: Terms and fee structures between MPL (marketplace lender) and bank

dataEntities.name: Batch
dataEntities.description: Group of loans for purchase processing

dataEntities.name: LoanAction
dataEntities.description: Operations performed on loans (purchase, interest accrual, etc.)

dataEntities.name: AccountConfig
dataEntities.description: Account configuration based on MPL, issuing bank, loan type, and objective

dataEntities.name: TrueUpVolumeFee
dataEntities.description: Minimum fee true-up calculations for contracts

dataEntities.name: GroomingProcess
dataEntities.description: Workflow for changing loan type with retroactive interest calculation

messagingPatterns.name: TransferOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures transfer messages are reliably sent to payment systems

messagingPatterns.name: DailyInterestOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures interest accrual messages are reliably processed

messagingPatterns.name: VolumeFeeOutbox
messagingPatterns.description: Ensures volume fee messages are reliably processed

messagingPatterns.name: SellingWebApiMessagesQueue
messagingPatterns.description: Handles payment status updates from COS

messagingPatterns.name: LoanSaleStatusChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes loan status change events to hooks service

messagingPatterns.name: BatchPurchaseCompleted
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes batch completion events to hooks service

findings.title: Insufficient error handling in payment processing
findings.description: The payment simulation in modules/cos/src/main.py lacks proper error handling for failed transactions, which could lead to inconsistent state. Implement robust error handling and retries for payment failures.

findings.title: AWS credentials passed as environment variables
findings.description: AWS credentials are passed as environment variables in docker-compose.yml which is a security risk. Use AWS IAM roles or a secure credentials manager instead of hardcoded credentials.

findings.title: Tight coupling to simulated services
findings.description: The test framework is tightly coupled to specific implementations of simulated services, making it brittle when service interfaces change. Consider using interface-based testing or contract testing approaches.
